---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new assessment capability, export, workflow, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Problem

What gap does this solve for operators, auditors, or developers?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired CLI, report, exporter, or web behavior.

## Example

Provide an example command, report snippet, API response shape, or workflow if helpful.

## Additional Context

Include tradeoffs, compatibility concerns, related tools, or Cloudflare product context.
